problem id: a6704625
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(4) XOR NOT SHL(1)) OR SHR(3)

examples:
  00010001 -> 11001110
  01111000 -> 10001111
  01100101 -> 01101111
  10111000 -> 00010111
  10001000 -> 01110111
  01111100 -> 11001111
  10100100 -> 11111101
  01100111 -> 01001111
  01110101 -> 01001110
  11010001 -> 01011010

query: 01000111
predicted answer: 00001101
